title: Shobiy #7629
definition:
Shobi = "glorious"

 1) son of Nahash of Rabbah of the children of Ammon; supported David
    during Absalom's rebellion
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shobi = "glorious"

 1) son of Nahash of Rabbah of the children of Ammon; supported David
    during Absalom's rebellion

    NASB:  appar. an Ammonite prince
